channel.title: LLM Timeline — NVIDIA Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from NVIDIA.

item.title: EDEN (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: EDEN License: closed Type: model "EDEN (environmentally-derived evolutionary network) family of metagenomic foundation models, including a 28 billion parameter model trained on 9.7 trillion nucleotide tokens from BaseData1 . This dataset, at the time of training, contained more than 10 billion novel genes from over 1 million new species, and is intentionally enriched for environmental and host-associated metagenomes, phage sequences, and mobile genetic elements, enabling the model to learn from diverse and novel cross-species evolutionary mechanisms and apply them to key challenges in human health."

item.title: NitroGen (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: NitroGen License: open Type: model "NitroGen is a unified vision-to-action model designed to play video games directly from raw frames. It takes video game footage as input and outputs gamepad actions... trained on 40,000 hours of gameplay videos across more than 1,000 games."

item.title: NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: NVIDIA-Nemotron-3-Nano-30B-A3B License: open Type: model Knowledge cutoff November 28, 2025 (post).

item.title: Orchestrator-8B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Orchestrator-8B License: open Type: model Base Model: Qwen3-8B

item.title: Nemotron Elastic (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron Elastic License: open Type: model "Nemotron Elastic, a framework for building reasoning-oriented LLMs, including hybrid Mamba-Attention architectures, that embed multiple nested submodels within a single parent model, each optimized for different deployment configurations and budgets. Each of these submodels shares weights with the parent model and can be extracted zero-shot during deployment without additional training or fine-tuning...We apply Nemotron Elastic to the Nemotron Nano V2 12B model, simultaneously producing a 9B and a 6B model using only 110B training tokens"

item.title: TiDAR (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: TiDAR License: open Type: model Base model: Qwen3-8B (36T) + 150B continual training. "TiDAR, a sequence-level hybrid architecture that drafts tokens (Thinking) in Diffusion and samples final outputs (Talking) AutoRegressively - all within a single forward pass using specially designed structured attention masks"

item.title: SONIC (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: SONIC License: open Type: model Supersizing mOtion tracking for Natural humanoId Control (SONIC). Training dataset calcs: (700 hours * 3,600 seconds/hour * 50 frames/second ) / 1 frame/token = 126M tokens (refined to 100M+ after rigorous filtering ); 150,000 steps * 6.67M tokens/batch = 1.0T total tokens seen during training.

item.title: NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1.6 (NVIDIA)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.description: Parameters: 2B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.description: Parameters: 1B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 600K License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Jet-Nemotron-4B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Jet-Nemotron-4B License: open Type: model "pre-training corpus and train Jet-Nemotron models for 50B tokens. This is also the setting in Section 2 where we perform PostNAS. At the second stage, we include more high-quality data from math [65] and coding [66, 67] domains into our data mixture. The models are then trained on 350B tokens."

item.title: Nemotron Nano 2 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron Nano 2 License: open Type: model Announce: https://research.nvidia.com/labs/adlr/NVIDIA-Nemotron-Nano-2/

item.description: Parameters: 49B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.description: Parameters: 335.3M License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: UltraLong-8B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: UltraLong-8B License: open Type: model Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct base. 4M context window.

item.title: Nemotron-H-56B-Base (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron-H-56B-Base License: open Type: model https://research.nvidia.com/labs/adlr/nemotronh/

item.title: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B License: open Type: model Llama 3.1 405B base. "Llama-3.1-Nemotron-Ultra-253B-v1 is a large language model (LLM) which is a derivative of Meta Llama-3.1-405B-Instruct (AKA the reference model). It is a reasoning model that is post trained for reasoning, human chat preferences, and tasks, such as RAG and tool calling. The model supports a context length of 128K tokens. This model fits on a single 8xH100 node for inference."

item.title: Llama Nemotron Nano 8B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 8B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Llama Nemotron Ultra 253B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 253B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.description: Parameters: 2.2B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Cosmos-Transfer1-7B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Llama-3.3-Nemotron-Super-49B-v1 License: open Type: model Meta Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct derivative "that is post trained for reasoning, human chat preferences, and tasks, such as RAG and tool calling. The model supports a context length of 128K tokens."

item.title: DoMINO (NVIDIA)
item.description: License: closed Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Cosmos Nemotron 34B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Cosmos Nemotron 34B License: open Type: model VLM. MMMU=47.33. "VILA project becomes part of Cosmos Nemotron family" https://github.com/NVlabs/Cosmos-Nemotron Vision Encoder: SigLIP-400M, Language Encoder: Yi-34B https://blogs.nvidia.com/blog/nemotron-model-families/

item.title: Cosmos 1.0 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Cosmos 1.0 License: open Type: model WFM (world foundation model). "The models range in size from 4 billion to 14 billion parameters, with Nano being the smallest and Ultra being the largest... "Cosmos WFM models, were trained on 9,000 trillion tokens [9,000T] from 20 million hours of real-world human interactions, environment, industrial, robotics, and driving data..." https://techcrunch.com/2025/01/06/nvidia-releases-its-own-brand-of-world-models/ Actual working: https://lifearchitect.ai/cosmos/

item.title: Fugatto 1 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 2.5B License: closed Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Hymba (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 1.5B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.description: Parameters: 8.3B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.description: Parameters: 4.2B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: NVLM-D 72B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: NVLM-X 72B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 72B License: closed Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Llama-3.1-Nemotron-70B License: open Type: model Related paper: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.01257

item.title: nGPT (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: nGPT License: open Type: model "a novel neural network architecture, the normalized Transformer (nGPT) with representation learning on the hypersphere. In nGPT, all vectors forming the embeddings, MLP, attention matrices and hidden states are unit norm normalized...reducing the number of training steps required to achieve the same accuracy by a factor of 4 to 20, depending on the sequence length."

item.title: NLVM 1.0 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: NLVM 1.0 License: open Type: model Flamingo clone. "we use Qwen2-72B-Instruct as the default text-only LLM backbone. We also employ Nous-Hermes-2-Yi-34B for ablation study and faster experimentation... we use InternViT-6B as the default vision encoder"

item.title: NV-Embed-v2 (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Minitron-4B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Minitron-4B License: open Type: model Pruned and distilled from Nemotron-4 15B: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/how-to-prune-and-distill-llama-3-1-8b-to-an-nvidia-llama-3-1-minitron-4b-model/

item.title: Minitron-8B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Minitron-8B License: open Type: model Pruned and distilled from Nemotron-4 15B: https://developer.nvidia.com/blog/how-to-prune-and-distill-llama-3-1-8b-to-an-nvidia-llama-3-1-minitron-4b-model/

item.title: Nemotron-4 340B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 340B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Mamba2-Hybrid (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: 8.7B License: open Type: model AI model by NVIDIA

item.title: Nemotron-4-340B (NVIDIA)
item.description: Parameters: Nemotron-4-340B License: open Type: model Open-source equiv of Mar/2023 GPT-4 (1760MoE≈340B, 13T), same param count but 2x the tokens of May/2023 PaLM 2 (340B, 3.6T), competitor to Nov/2023 Grok-1 (314B, 6T). Trained on 6,144 H100s. ~1.3TB for inference. 50+ natural and 40+ coding languages. Trained between December 2023 and May 2024. MMLU 0-shot for instruct=78.7, 5-shot for base=81.1. Permalink for paper: https://research.nvidia.com/publication/2024-06_nemotron-4-340b

item.title: NV-Embed-v1 (NVIDIA)
